summary: The ExEx WAL module divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in early returns; no notification storage, finalized removal, iteration, or block-hash lookup behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 117: M	crates/exex/exex/src/wal/mod.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return Ok(())`, `return Ok(Box::new(std::iter::empty()))`, and `return Ok(None)` expressions to semicolon-terminated forms.
No file ID removal, notification iteration range, storage deletion, or block-cache lookup behavior changed.
